name: devloop-ai
description: An iterative AI engineering loop for hackathon demos

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace api" "npm start --workspace web"
scripts.test: npm test --workspace api && npm test --workspace web -- --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace web
